Build information

dev
A A

A focused Ukrainian verb trainer built for daily practice.

  • 428 verbs with full conjugation tables
  • All major tenses — теперішній, минулий, майбутній, наказовий, умовний
  • Smart frequency weighting & learning presets
  • Text-to-speech pronunciation 🔊 (uk-UA)
  • Full conjugation tables for every verb 📖
  • Offline support (PWA)

Progress and settings save automatically.

Готово ?
Автоматичне читання увімкнено.
Натисніть Продовжити, щоб розпочати.
Practice tips

A few simple habits make this trainer work much better.

  1. Start with Most Crucial or Daily Mix before widening the verb pool.
  2. Say the form before reveal when you want active recall, then use Hear to clean up pronunciation.
  3. Open the verb detail view when a form feels fuzzy, then come back to the cards for repetition.
  4. Keep usage examples on when a verb needs context, and hide them again when you want faster drilling.

Short, consistent sessions usually beat big irregular ones.
